programme.title: Sunday Morning Live
programme.desc: Topical debate covering religious, moral and ethical issues, with guest panellists and contributions from viewers(n)

programme.title: Wanted Down Under
programme.desc: Having moved to the UK from Australia almost 50 years ago, Simon MacLean longs to return, and hopes a trial week in Perth will persuade fiancee Jane(n)

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Anita Manning and the team are at Wetherby racecourse, where the reds and blues battle it out with experts Charles Hanson and Kate Bliss before they go to auction(n)

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Singer Russell Watson tells Aled Jones how a near-death experience transformed his Christian faith, while the pair sing hymns including In Christ Alone and Ave Maria(n)

programme.title: Points of View
programme.desc: Viewers' opinions on BBC shows and behind-the-scenes reports on new programmes(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin is in Pembrokeshire with a couple who want not only to buy their first house together, but also need accommodation for holidaymakers and a horse(n)

programme.title: War Horse (2011)
programme.desc: A farmer's son forms a close bond with a horse he trains, but is forced to give the animal up when it is sold to the British army during the First World War. The horse passes through various owners on both sides as he travels across the battlefields of France, while the boy refuses to give up on being reunited. Steven Spielberg's drama based on Michael Morpurgo's book, starring Jeremy Irvine, Tom Hiddleston and Benedict Cumberbatch(n)

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: The team looks at all things autumnal, with Ellie Harrison on Alderney where autumn storms have washed up seaweed that is providing a seasonal feast for an unexpected animal. John Craven takes a walk in the footsteps of John Keats to explore the landscape that inspired his famous poem To Autumn, while Anita Rani is on the farm of Michelin-starred chef Tommy Banks to get some hints on pickling and preserving autumn produce(n)

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough turns his attention to life in Asia, the planet's most varied and extreme continent, which stretches from the Arctic Circle to the equator. Walruses gather in huge numbers in the frozen north and brown bears roam around remote Russian volcanoes, while the deep jungle provides sanctuary for the last few Sumatran rhino. There is also a glimpse of rarely seen creatures, from yeti-like golden snub-nosed monkeys in the mountain forests of China to a bizarre predator in the baking deserts of Iran(n)

programme.title: Strictly Come Dancing
programme.desc: Tess Daly and Claudia Winkleman announce the results of the judges' scores and viewers' votes, with the two couples with the lowest combined scores taking part in a dance-off to decide who will be next to leave the contest. With music by Emeli Sande, who performs her single Shine, and an Elton John-inspired group dance(n)

programme.title: His Dark Materials
programme.desc: Orphan Lyra Belacqua's world is turned upside-down by her long-absent uncle's return from the North, while the glamorous Mrs Coulter visits Jordan College with a proposition. Jack Thorne's adaptation of the first of Philip Pullman's fantasy adventure novel series, starring Dafne Keen, Ruth Wilson, James McAvoy, Clarke Peters and Anne-Marie Duff(n)

programme.title: World on Fire
programme.desc: Paris falls to the Germans with not a single shot fired and Webster begins a campaign of resistance under the nose of the Nazis at the American hospital, while in Berlin, Mr and Mrs Rossler are arrested for neglecting their patriotic duties. Harry has returned home to Manchester with one of the Senegalese troops who stayed by his side to transport soldiers off Dunkirk beach, and is dumbfounded to learn that a newly formed special operations unit is interested in having him on board. Lois finds herself growing closer to Vernon(n)

programme.title: Match of the Day 2
programme.desc: Mark Chapman presents action from today's Premier League fixtures - Crystal Palace v Leicester City at Selhurst Park and Everton v Tottenham Hotspur Goodison Park. Palace and Leicester were both looking to build on their strong starts to the campaign, while Everton and Spurs were looking to improve on some disappointing results in the early stages of the season. Plus, a round-up of yesterday's top-flight goals(n)

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee and Lucy take the children out trick or treating for Halloween, but the night soon turns disastrous for Lee when he loses his mobile on the porch of a spooky Victorian house. After returning to the property to retrieve his phone, Lee discovers that the building is full of secrets that would be far better left undisturbed(n)

programme.title: Pop Goes Northern Ireland
programme.desc: The music and news stories of 1989, the year of the Deal bombing, which killed 11 members of the Royal Marine band at their barracks. A series of deaths led to accusations of both IRA operatives in the Irish police force and collusion between security forces and Loyalist paramilitaries. The year also saw the release of the Guildford Four, after their convictions were declared a miscarriage of justice at the appeal court(n)

programme.title: House of Commons
programme.desc: He is one of the most controversial figures to have sat in the Speaker's chair in the House of Commons. As John Bercow bows out after ten controversial years as Speaker, BBC Parliament revisits the career of a modernising but polarising figure. See the teenage Bercow's ‘Question Time' debut, not from the Commons but on the TV programme. Relive the former Tory MP's clashes with ministers as he's accused of bias and of bending the rules to try to stop Brexit. In addition - with more Commons archive - Bercow Bows Out offers the chance to re-live some of his favourite unique phrases, whether he's advising an MP to search for ‘a soothing medicament' or accusing others of ‘chuntering from a sedentary position'(n)

programme.title: House of Commons
programme.desc: He is one of the most controversial figures to have sat in the Speaker's chair in the House of Commons. As John Bercow bows out after ten controversial years as Speaker, BBC Parliament revisits the career of a modernising but polarising figure. See the teenage Bercow's ‘Question Time' debut, not from the Commons but on the TV programme. Relive the former Tory MP's clashes with ministers as he's accused of bias and of bending the rules to try to stop Brexit. In addition - with more Commons archive - Bercow Bows Out offers the chance to re-live some of his favourite unique phrases, whether he's advising an MP to search for ‘a soothing medicament' or accusing others of ‘chuntering from a sedentary position'(n)

programme.title: Disclosure
programme.desc: With growing numbers of people opting for cosmetic surgery through high-street clinics, what happens when things go wrong? programme.title: HMS Timbertown
programme.desc: Documentary revealing the experiences of 102 sailors from Lewis who were interned in a PoW camp in the Netherlands for the duration of the First World War. Presenter Angela MacLean retraces the journey the men took to the camp, which became known as HMS Timbertown, and uncovers the realities of their lives there - from the highs of football matches, to the lows of failed escape attempts and execution(n)

programme.title: Trapped
programme.desc: With no police support able to arrive from Reykjavik until the snowstorm clears, Andri and his colleagues need to work fast. In Icelandic and English(n)

programme.title: An Lot (The Croft)
programme.desc: It is late spring with summer on the horizon as Lewis man Donald MacSween fulfils his dream of giving up his day job and becoming a full-time crofter. Lambing is fully underway as he plays host to a group of teenagers who provide a willing helping hand. His winter fuel is taken care of with the help of a mechanical peat cutter and one of his sows produces her first litter of piglets on the lot(n)

programme.title: Trusadh (Compelling Stories)
programme.desc: A nostalgic look back at going to school, beginning with personal accounts of the first day, when children leave their parents' side for the first time in their lives(n)

programme.title: TradFest
programme.desc: Allan MacDonald presents music from TradFest Music Festival, 2018. Amongst the performers are Frankie Gavin and Fionnán Mac Gabhann(n)

programme.title: Luther 500: An t-Stri Spioradail (The Battle for Souls)
programme.desc: In a journey that takes him from Rome, Germany and Geneva to the Outer Hebrides and across the island of Ireland, Alex O'Henley uncovers why the Gaelic-speaking areas of Scotland became, to a large extent, Protestant while most of Ireland remained Catholic. He shows how Martin Luther's legacy still looms large over the Gaelic world(n)

programme.desc: Ruairidh Alastair MacLennan explores racism in Scotland. He visits a charity working to eliminate discrimination, hoping to understand what constitutes a racist act(n)

programme.title: Belladrum
programme.desc: Highlights from the 2018 music festival coverage, here featuring English rockers You Me at Six(n)

programme.title: Super 4
programme.desc: Twinkle says goodbye to her friends to rejoin her people. But when the team - now the Super 3 - have to stave off a Sykronian invasion, they cannot do it without Twinkle(n)

programme.title: Super 4
programme.desc: Rock Brock becomes the target of an angry elf after he breaks his magic cauldron during a battle with a ferocious dragon - or so he says(n)

programme.title: Thunderbirds Are Go
programme.desc: The heroes of International Rescue must deal with emergencies on two fronts when an orbiting solar energy station malfunctions, placing a passing airliner - and its precious cargo - in peril(n)

programme.title: RWC 2019 Live
programme.desc: Mark Pougatch is joined by a panel of experts to look at the latest team news and make predictions ahead of the World Cup final(n)

programme.title: RWC 2019 Live
programme.desc: England v South Africa (Kick-off 9.00am). Mark Pougatch presents coverage of the showpiece match, which takes place at International Stadium Yokohama and will see the winners of the Webb Ellis Cup crowned. Eddie Jones' men reached their first World Cup final since 2007 with a thrilling 19-7 victory over reigning champions New Zealand seven days ago, while the Springboks overcame Wales in a more attritional affair on Sunday. With commentary by Nick Mullins(n)

programme.title: Riding a Dream
programme.desc: The remarkable story of 18-year-old British Muslim woman Khadijah Mellah, and her journey to the 2019 Magnolia Cup. From her inner city riding school to one of the most prestigious horse racing events in the world, this film follows her ups and downs as she gets ready for the race of her life(n)

programme.title: Ninja Warrior UK
programme.desc: Competitors from across the nation test their strength, speed and courage in the semi-final of the obstacle-course challenge, hosted by Ben Shephard, Rochelle Humes and Chris Kamara. Those who make it to the end of the adrenaline-fuelled mission face one final task - scaling the heights of a tower named Mount Midoriyama - as they battle it out for the title of Ninja Warrior UK. With brand new obstacles to face, the course is more extreme than ever, as the best competitors from four heats return to fight it out for a place in the final(n)

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates a comical selection of mishaps filmed by viewers, featuring themes of sport, gardens, birthdays, bad animals and sibling and including everything from giddy grandmas, cute kids and crazy animals to below-the-belt mishaps, practical jokers and painful-looking accidents(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The apparent suicide of a childless farmer's wife puts Barnaby on the scent of an ancient land feud over Setwale Wood. Potions, witchcraft, marital infidelity and a ruthless campaign to save the area form the heady brew that convinces the detective he is dealing with a case of murder. Wendy Craig guest stars, with John Nettles and Daniel Casey(n)

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Game show, hosted by Ben Shephard, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as celebrity contestants Mikey North, Una Healy, Carl Froch and Alison Hammond pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Take Me Out
programme.desc: A model, a gardener, a cage fighter and Mr Luton are the latest candidates to enter the 'love lift' in the hope of impressing 30 single women and winning a date - but must first get the female participants to keep their lights on as a sign of approval. Paddy McGuinness presents(n)

programme.title: The X Factor: Celebrity
programme.desc: Dermot O'Leary hosts the next stage in the star-studded version of the singing contest, which features further live performances in London. The remaining acts have got through the initial rounds in Los Angeles and the judge's deliberation, and now must battle it out for the chance to be crowned champion and win a record deal. They will have the support and coaching of the judges, with Simon Cowell taking charge of the Groups, Nicole Scherzinger mentoring the Overs, and Louis Walsh looking after the Unders(n)

programme.title: The Jonathan Ross Show
programme.desc: The host's guests this week are broadcasting icon Trevor McDonald, footballer Peter Crouch, model Jourdan Dunn and award-winning comedian Aisling Bea. Plus, singers John Newman and Nina Nesbitt will be performing together in the studio(n)

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: Against Murtaugh's advice, Cole reaches out to Tom Barnes for help with a case that hits close to home, thus putting the duo's partnership is put to the test. Meanwhile, Trish prepares to announce her campaign for district attorney. Damon Wayans, Seann William Scott and Keesha Sharp star(n)

programme.title: Rugby World Cup 2019 Highlights
programme.desc: England v South Africa. Jill Douglas presents action from the final, which took place at International Stadium Yokohama and saw the winners of the Webb Ellis Cup crowned. Eddie Jones' men reached their first World Cup final since 2007 with a thrilling 19-7 victory over reigning champions New Zealand seven days ago. With commentary by Nick Mullins(n)

programme.title: Bang on the Money
programme.desc: 'Pecs & Flex' from Essex and 'Tooniversity Challenge' from Newcastle battle it out to hit a specific target number 'bang on' in a series of physical and mental challenges. At the end of the contest, the most successful group could win up to £40,000. Presented by Rickie Haywood-Williams and Melvin Odoom(n)

programme.desc: Text-based information service(n)

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot(n)

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as Matt, Katrina, Tim and Farida pit their wits against a ruthless quiz genius in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Aaron tries to process things, and Laurel apologises to Jai, while Mandy puts pressure on Charity(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: As Emma recovers in hospital, Steve reports Ali to Dr Gaddas, and Shona is shocked to discover Gail has taken it upon herself to cancel the wedding. When a delivery of beard oil ingredients arrive for Sinead, Carla decides to keep the business going for Daniel(n)

programme.title: The Mountain
programme.desc: The arrival of spring sees the crowds return to Snowdon, with railwayman Steff re-opening the summit cafe and singer Shirley Bassey unveiling a train carriage named in her honour. The return of paying customers is good news for Alwena and her cafe 1,800ft up the mountain, but the busy paths to the summit spell trouble for Rob and his mountain rescue team(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Gary meets with a private detective and asks him to find out what he can about Dr Ali, and Beth is furious when she finds Carla preparing beard oil. Sally is unimpressed to find Abi drunk with Kevin instead of revising(n)

programme.title: Fifty Shades of Green with Alan Titchmarsh
programme.desc: To celebrate half a century spent in gardens around the world, the broadcaster visits his favourite horticultural locations around the UK with friends and experts who share his passions. He meets food writer Mary Berry at his favourite vegetable plot, goes inside Prince Charles' garden at Highgrove, takes a tour of Griff Rhys Jones' epic space and and strokes the hallowed turf on Wimbledon's Centre Court. Alan also returns to the allotment where, as a toddler, he was first introduced to gardening(n)

programme.title: Riding a Dream
programme.desc: The remarkable story of 18-year-old British Muslim woman Khadijah Mellah, and her journey to the 2019 Magnolia Cup. From her inner city riding school to one of the most prestigious horse racing events in the world, this film follows her ups and downs as she gets ready for the race of her life(n)

programme.title: Banks of England
programme.desc: A celebration of the life of former England goalkeeper Gordon Banks, who won the World Cup in 1966, and was also remembered for a sensational save from Pele in the tournament four years later. Featuring insights from past and present players, as well as Banks himself(n)

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite

programme.title: Super 4

programme.title: Thunderbirds Are Go

programme.title: RWC 2019 Live

programme.title: RWC 2019 Live
programme.desc: England v South Africa (Kick-off 9.00am). Mark Pougatch presents coverage of the showpiece match, which takes place at International Stadium Yokohama and will see the winners of the Webb Ellis Cup crowned. Eddie Jones' men reached their first World Cup final since 2007 with a thrilling 19-7 victory over reigning champions New Zealand seven days ago, while the Springboks overcame Wales in a more attritional affair on Sunday. With commentary by Nick Mullins(n)

programme.title: Riding a Dream
programme.desc: The remarkable story of 18-year-old British Muslim woman Khadijah Mellah, and her journey to the 2019 Magnolia Cup. From her inner city riding school to one of the most prestigious horse racing events in the world, this film follows her ups and downs as she gets ready for the race of her life(n)

programme.title: Ninja Warrior UK
programme.desc: Competitors from across the nation test their strength, speed and courage in the semi-final of the obstacle-course challenge, hosted by Ben Shephard, Rochelle Humes and Chris Kamara. Those who make it to the end of the adrenaline-fuelled mission face one final task - scaling the heights of a tower named Mount Midoriyama - as they battle it out for the title of Ninja Warrior UK. With brand new obstacles to face, the course is more extreme than ever, as the best competitors from four heats return to fight it out for a place in the final(n)

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates a comical selection of mishaps filmed by viewers, featuring themes of sport, gardens, birthdays, bad animals and sibling and including everything from giddy grandmas, cute kids and crazy animals to below-the-belt mishaps, practical jokers and painful-looking accidents(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The apparent suicide of a childless farmer's wife puts Barnaby on the scent of an ancient land feud over Setwale Wood. Potions, witchcraft, marital infidelity and a ruthless campaign to save the area form the heady brew that convinces the detective he is dealing with a case of murder. Wendy Craig guest stars, with John Nettles and Daniel Casey(n)

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Game show, hosted by Ben Shephard, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special

They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Take Me Out

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Steve and Snot are humiliated when they attend a 'cool kids' party. Intending to get their own back, the pair decide to arranging their own bash for other unpopular teens, changing their destinies, and prompting a visit from their future selves. Meanwhile, Roger dines out with Haley, but takes offense when the waitress compliments Haley's order but not his. Animated comedy, with the voice of Seth MacFarlane(n)

programme.title: Corpse Bride (2005)
programme.desc: Shy bridegroom Victor unintentionally gets himself hitched to a ghostly bride, who lures him down into the netherworld. But as he strives to find his way back to the land of the living, a treacherous aristocrat is scheming to marry Victor's flesh-and-blood fiancee. Tim Burton's stop-motion animated fantasy, with the voices of Johnny Depp, Helena Bonham Carter, Emily Watson, Christopher Lee and Richard E Grant(n)

programme.desc: A conspiracy theorist's investigation of his wife's death in a nuclear reactor meltdown leads him and his soldier son into an encounter with underground creatures, which go on a deadly rampage across the world. The only hope for the human race may lie with another equally destructive giant monster. Thriller remake, starring Aaron Taylor-Johnson, Bryan Cranston and Ken Watanabe(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Juice
programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness, Anna Richardson, Will Mellor and Queer Eye's Tan France join Keith Lemon, Holly Willoughby and Mel B for a spooky special of the cheeky game show(n)

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Peter is upset to learn that Lois has slept with his new friend Bill Clinton and decides to retaliate by having an affair of his own - but soon realises he loves her too much to ever be unfaithful. Meanwhile, Lois and Stewie try to potty-train Brian(n)

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Brian accidentally sells Stewie's favourite teddy bear at a garage sale, so dog and baby embark on an epic journey to reclaim it from the buyer. Meanwhile, Peter loses his licence owing to careless driving, forcing Meg to chauffeur him everywhere(n)

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Stan hopes a beach-based assignment infiltrating a group of renegade surfers will be good for his dangerously high blood pressure. Meanwhile, Jeff and Haley have a pregnancy scare, Steve befriends a homeless drifter, and Roger tries to persuade Fifa to host the next World Cup in the Smiths' back yard. Animated comedy, with the voice of Seth MacFarlane(n)

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: The boys begin an archaeological dig in their bar after Grumio unearths an old brooch while sitting on the toilet. They try to keep their activity a secret but others cotton on and when a professor of archaeology goes missing, the boys are brought in for questioning as they paid him a recent visit. Guest starring Tony Robinson(n)

programme.title: Don't Hate the Playaz
programme.desc: Maya Jama, Richard Blackwood and London Hughes go up against Lady Leshurr, Katherine Ryan and Fleur East as they go head to head in rap battles, dance-offs and freestyling challenges. Jordan Stephens hosts, with help from DJ Shortee Blitz on the decks(n)

programme.title: Release the Hounds
programme.desc: Reggie Yates hosts as The Box presenters AJ Odudu, Maya Jama and Will Best face the sausage-maker from hell, a zombie scientist and a creepy birdwatcher(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: The Planet's Funniest Animals
programme.desc: Humorous clips of pets and other animals in unusual situations(n)

programme.title: Totally Bonkers Guinness World Records
programme.desc: A selection of some of the most incredible and peculiar record-breaking attempts, including the tallest human pyramid and the longest ramp jump with a caravan. Matt Edmondson narrates(n)

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates a comical selection of mishaps filmed by viewers. Andy Murray's mum toughens up her son by using him for target practice, viewers learn what the Mastermind chair does on its day off, and Peter Stringfellow's jumbo 'tablet' gives someone a black eye. The show also features a helicopter for hamsters, a goat who thinks that he is a butler, and Harry is reunited with the daughter that he never knew(n)

programme.title: Dinner Date
programme.desc: Grace from Kingston upon Thames picks three blind dates from five potential partners, based entirely on the menus they have created. When the three dinners have been eaten, she decides who she wants to see again. Narrated by Charlotte Hudson(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Someone receives some life changing news. Meanwhile, Rhona puts Marlon in his place(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Jealous that Maria and Gary have arranged a date, Ali dismisses Emma's pain as food poisoning, but it turns out to be far more serious. Gemma is worried when she is told she is being discharged but the babies must remain at the hospital in Llandudno(n)

programme.title: The Ellen DeGeneres Show
programme.desc: Guest host Justin Hartley welcomes Ciara, who discusses her role as judge on America's Most Musical Family. Plus, Hannah Brown talks about Dancing with the Stars, and Chris Janson performs Good Vibes(n)

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: A new corporate vice president shakes things up at the store. Mateo gets involved in relationship rumours and Dina gets revenge against a snitch(n)

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: During the morning meeting, Glenn accidentally tells the employees the reason Amy has been late to work lately and rumours spread about the state of her marriage. In an attempt to cheer Amy up, Dina organises a ladies' lunch and forces everyone to participate. Comedy, starring America Ferrera(n)

programme.title: Dress to Impress
programme.desc: In Cardiff, drama student Josiah, factory worker Daniel and support worker Tomas hope to win a date with make-up artist Chanel. All they have to do is find her the perfect outfit - limited only by time, budget and their own sense of style(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Someone receives some life changing news. Meanwhile, Rhona puts Marlon in his place(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street

programme.title: The Ellen DeGeneres Show
programme.desc: Jennifer Aniston discusses The Morning Show, and Walt Disney Company CEO Bob Iger also joins Ellen on the sofa. Plus, Charlie Puth performs his hit Mother(n)

programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Rylan Clark-Neal hosts a revival of the supermarket-based game show in which three pairs of shoppers go wild in the aisles to win a £3,000 prize. The rebooted show features exciting new games, challenges and some famous faces(n)

programme.title: Dinner Date
programme.desc: The matchmaking series sees Robbie from Hampshire dine with three lucky women. When the dinners have been eaten and the dates are done, who might he want to see for seconds?(n)

programme.title: Dress to Impress
programme.desc: n London, model Elesha is hoping to be impressed by the style choices of three potential suitors. To impress her, they have to dress her, as Elesha has no other information about them but the outfits they buy. At the end of the challenge, which of the three competitors will she choose to take out on a date?(n)

programme.title: Take Me Out
programme.desc: A hairdresser from Glasgow, a rugby player from Surrey, a children's entertainer from Southport and a student from Southampton enters the 'love lift' in the hope of impressing 30 single women and winning a date - but must first get the female participants to keep their lights on as a sign of approval. Paddy McGuinness presents(n)

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates a comical selection of mishaps filmed by viewers, featuring spawning rituals in Essex, government reforms through the medium of roller-dance, and the painful reason why One Direction no longer buy pitta bread(n)

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates a comical selection of mishaps filmed by viewers, featuring everything from giddy grandmas, cute kids and crazy animals to below-the-belt mishaps, practical jokers and painful-looking accidents(n)

programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Rylan Clark-Neal hosts a revival of the supermarket-based game show in which three pairs of shoppers go wild in the aisles to win a £3,000 prize(n)

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Stewie questions everything he has ever won after receiving a participation medal at school, while Peter causes a fight between Lois's parents(n)

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Hayley convinces the CIA staff to go on strike after she witnesses harsh working conditions. Roger and Steve watch Breaking Bad in reverse, discovering that the show is hiding a scavenger hunt(n)

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: The boys face uncertainty when their landlord evicts them without notice from their flat. Marcus hopes his parents, who are visiting for the weekend, will help him onto the property ladder, but his dad has other plans for their savings. Meanwhile, Jason's smooth-talking lands him a job as an estate agent(n)

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: A windfall allows the Griffins to buy a restaurant, but it fails to enjoy much success until Joe invites some of his disabled friends to come along - bringing Peter's prejudices to the fore(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan gets a new uniform and is proud to wear it - until he sits on a freshly painted chair. Classic comedy, starring Reg Varney(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Arthur is attracted to Beryl, the clippie on his regular bus. However, she has only two interests in life - men with a fondness for athletics, and those with a good head of hair. Reg Varney stars(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: The glamorous Ruth Van Rydock contacts her old friend Jane Marple with a mystery - her sister Carrie Louise's study has been devastated by a suspicious fire. While Carrie Louise has the same cheerful outlook as ever, Ruth fears dark forces are at play at Stonygates, the home Carrie shares with her third husband, various relatives and a motley crew of young criminals, the latest subject of Carrie's philanthropic endeavours. But on the evening before a theatrical show is staged for their guests, one of whom is Miss Marple, an even more fascinating performance takes place before their very eyes - one where the final act is murder. Julia McKenzie stars, with guest appearances from Joan Collins, Penelope Wilton, Brian Cox, Maxine Peake, Alexei Sayle, Sarah Smart, Ian Ogilvy, Sean Hughes and Nigel Terry(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: A man accused of murdering five people is killed in prison shortly before going to trial, wrapping up a lot of loose ends and saving the state the expense of keeping him behind bars indefinitely. Alas, Morse cannot help wondering why the body of one of his victims was never found - and the chance discovery of a corpse gives him the perfect opportunity to investigate further. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A young woman asks Poirot to investigate her father's murder - a 14-year-old crime for which her mother was found guilty and executed. The detective agrees to investigate, but warns his client that he may discover things she does not want to hear. David Suchet stars, with Rachael Stirling, Aidan Gillen, Aimee Mullens, Toby Stephens, Gemma Jones, Patrick Malahide and Annette Badland(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective investigates a double poisoning, aiming to prove the innocence of Elinor Carlisle, the chief suspect in the deaths of her aunt and her rival in love. However, it emerges that she is the only person with a motive, opportunity and means to administer the poison. Crime drama, starring David Suchet, Elisabeth Dermot-Walsh, Diana Quick, Paul McGann and Rupert Penry-Jones(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A philandering husband is found dying by the swimming pool after being shot during a house party at the home of Lady Lucy Angkatell. Legendary Belgian Sleuth Poirot, who is guest of honour at the gathering, appears to have an open-and-shut case on his hands - but the investigator finds himself up against one of his finest adversaries. Whodunit, guest-starring Sarah Miles (Ryan's Daughter), with David Suchet, Lysette Anthony and Edward Fox(n)

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: A local woman is killed when an experiment in biological warfare goes tragically wrong. Sam also falls victim to a potentially fatal illness as a result of the project. Foyle is forced to head into the most secretive and dangerous areas of wartime research, unearthing secrets that cannot be revealed even to the prime minister. Michael Kitchen stars, with Honeysuckle Weeks and Philip Franks(n)

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A professor feels humiliated when her internet dating video is leaked onto a website and watched by her students. The next morning she is found dead, the victim of what appears to be a straightforward suicide. However, Lewis is not convinced and digs deeper, identifying several suspects including the site's founder - but as he and Hathaway get closer to the truth amid a rising death toll, they find their personal and professional lives dredged up online for all to see. Guest starring Roxanne McKee (Game of Thrones) and Toby Stephens (Die Another Day), with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox(n)

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: The detective has been assigned to a quiet rural area in 1969, and finds himself back in uniform. However, he is reunited with his former CID colleagues when he discovers the body of a missing schoolgirl. Endeavour quickly finds a likely suspect, and is offered the chance to regain his lost status by making an arrest - but Thursday convinces him the man is innocent(n)

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Jack is asked to investigate the theft of a car belonging to a friend of Mullet, but misjudges the grizzled Superintendent's capacity for tact and diplomacy and it is not long before he is taken off the case. Things take a shocking turn when the car finally turns up - with the body of a drug dealer in the boot. Detective drama, starring David Jason, with Melanie Thaw and Bruce Alexander(n)

programme.title: The Syndicate
programme.desc: Jamie lives the high life, convinced the police cannot touch him now he has money - but the past comes back to haunt him when the local drug boss pays a visit. Bob says goodbye to those he loves as he prepares to undergo surgery, and Stuart is torn between his life with Amy and supporting Leanne, who is getting ready for her court case in Wales. Timothy Spall, Matthew McNulty, Joanna Page and Matthew Lewis star(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan indulges a whim and lifts Doreen off the ground, but strains his back in the process. Classic comedy, starring Reg Varney(n)

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Jack asks Arthur's sister out to the Boxing Day social - much to her brother's displeasure. Vintage comedy, starring Reg Varney(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective sets out for Norfolk when a country publican begs him to help solve a murder - but is disappointed when the innkeeper turns out to be a budding author and the killing fictional. However, he soon has food for thought when a real death occurs - committed by a seemingly ghostly hand. Geraldine Alexander and Ian McCulloch guest star, with David Suchet(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Colonel and Joan Maltravers host a dinner party to celebrate their son's return from Kenya but the meal is disrupted by an armed robbery. David gives chase to the thief and becomes a local hero - much to the exasperation of Bernie. Liz has a difficult decision to make after receiving an exciting offer from Ben. Guest starring Simon Williams, his wife Lucy Fleming and their son Tam Williams(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The police investigate the murder of an ex-army recluse and archaeological enthusiast and suspect a building dispute could provide a motive, while Dennis asks Liz for advice when he begins to notice a change in Jenny's behaviour. Vernon decides to play Cupid on behalf of his relative Gareth and sets him up on a blind date with Rosie, but does not count on the mechanic having another admirer. Rural drama starring Duncan Bell, Aislin McGuckin and Vanessa Hehir(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The dapper Belgian sleuth goes on an Egyptian cruise on board an old steamer, but when an American heiress is murdered, his little grey cells go into overdrive. On questioning each of his fellow passengers, he realises many of them have secrets they want to remain hidden. David Suchet stars, with James Fox, Judy Parfitt, Emily Blunt, Daisy Donovan, Frances de la Tour and David Soul(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth finds himself in interesting company as English socialites and American millionaires rub shoulders on board a train bound for the French Riviera. Passengers include oil magnate Rufus Van Aldin (Elliott Gould) and his daughter Ruth (Jaime Murray) - to whom he has given a magnificent ruby known as the Heart of Fire. With members of the aristocracy crammed into a confined space with their husbands, lovers and a renowned gemstone, murder cannot be far away. With Lindsay Duncan, Roger Lloyd Pack and James D'Arcy(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The murder of a retired university fellow leads to a complex investigation for Morse and Lewis as they piece together a story of student suicide, drugs and the mysterious dismissal of a loyal college scout. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with Phyllis Logan, Gabrielle Lloyd, Amanda Ryan and Tony Haygarth(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A lavish dinner party proves to be a prelude to murder and intrigue - but fortunately Poirot is among the guests, and soon realises the key to the mystery lies in a duel fought 10 years previously. Drama, starring David Suchet, Caroline Langrishe and John McEnery(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Hollywood actress Marina Gregg and her director husband take up residence at Gossington Hall in the village of St Mary Mead and hold a reception to meet their new neighbours, including the hall's previous owner Dolly Bantry. The celebrations turn to tragedy, however, after a fan fatally drinks a poisoned cocktail apparently meant for the new lady of the manor. But a different picture begins to emerge as Marina spits out a similarly spiked cup of coffee on the set of her new film - and Miss Marple investigates the star's unhappy past. Julia McKenzie stars, with Lindsay Duncan, Nigel Harman, Joanna Lumley, Martin Jarvis, Hugh Bonneville and Michele Dotrice(n)

programme.title: Dad's Army (2016)
programme.desc: The officious captain of a seaside town's home guard platoon tries to maintain the reputation and morale of his troops as the Second World War draws to a close. He finds himself dealing with the hunt for a German spy as well as a female journalist sent to report on the exploits of the brave but bumbling soldiers. Comedy based on the TV series, starring Toby Jones, Bill Nighy and Catherine Zeta-Jones(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A depressive gambler is found dead, the apparent victim of suicide. Dr Jane Moore, who once treated the man, is adamant he wouldn't have taken his own life - a theory backed up by the post-mortem. Thrilled to be working with Jane again, Barnaby investigates the case - and it isn't long before another of the doctor's patients is killed. Detective drama, starring John Nettles, Isla Blair, Jan Ravens and Daniel Casey(n)

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: An idyllic summer day in Oxford is torn asunder when a parcel bomb claims the life of eminent mathematician Adam Capstone, a genius in the field of 'Knot Theory'. As Lewis and Hathaway investigate, they discover that, while the victim's academic reputation was beyond reproach, his private life was far more dubious. It emerges Capstone was a man of carnal appetites, who had a string of affairs with young students, betraying his chemistry professor wife Elizabeth, providing her with a clear motive to do away with her cheating spouse. As the detectives work to identify the killer bomber, the case becomes a personal challenge for Lewis, who fears he may not be rewarded with another contract should he fail to impress Moody before his six-month trip to New Zealand. Detective drama, starring Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox, with Zoe Tapper, Tristam Summers and Oliver Lansley(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: As Syndicate 9 investigates the discovery of a woman's body in a Manchester hotel room, Gill introduces Rachel to high-flying DS Will Pemberton, unaware they are already well acquainted - they've been having a passionate, secret relationship for months. But while the volatile copper can be discreet when it comes to romance, will she be able to hide her feelings when Gill lets slip that she wasn't the first choice for the sergeant's job? Meanwhile, Janet is keen to give her own love life a boost, especially after seeing how happy Ade is with his new partner Eleanor. However, a speed-dating event might not be the best option, as Janet finds herself treating each brief encounter like a police interrogation. Crime drama, starring Suranne Jones, Lesley Sharp, Amelia Bullmore, Steve Touissant and Mina Anwar(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Unable to get used to the fact she was second choice for the sergeant's job, Rachel punishes Janet for keeping the truth from her, and although Will cheers her up with the news she has been chosen for a vice initiative, the detective is soon stung by Gill's harsh words. Meanwhile, an unconscious baby is admitted to hospital with injuries that do not match his parents' explanation of events, and when an unregistered childminder and her boyfriend enter the equation, it's unclear who had the boy's best interests at heart(n)

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A professor feels humiliated when her internet dating video is leaked onto a website and watched by her students. The next morning she is found dead, the victim of what appears to be a straightforward suicide. However, Lewis is not convinced and digs deeper, identifying several suspects including the site's founder - but as he and Hathaway get closer to the truth amid a rising death toll, they find their personal and professional lives dredged up online for all to see. Guest starring Roxanne McKee (Game of Thrones) and Toby Stephens (Die Another Day), with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Beautiful Russian aristocrat Countess Vera Rossakoff, the chief suspect in a series of jewel thefts, seemingly captivates Poirot with her charm and intellect, meaning Hastings and Miss Lemon have to do most of the actual detective work and ensure she is brought to justice. Drama, guest starring Kika Markham(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Jack is offered the job of bus inspector and Stan is promised extra overtime, for which he will not have to work - as well as a glamorous conductress. Reg Varney and Bob Grant star(n)

programme.desc: Jack is concerned for Vera as she refuses to eat or sleep, Des receives his decree nisi, Don contacts Bet to see how Ivy is, and Vicky wants Steve to go away with her(n)

programme.desc: Frank cannot believe what Zoe is telling him, Pollard panics when Elizabeth reveals her plan, and Archie's request gives Rachel the wrong idea(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Blakey cuts the canteen's opening hours, but when he sacks one of the staff, things really turn nasty. Comedy, starring Reg Varney and Stephen Lewis(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan and Jack eavesdrop on Blakey's medical - and completely misinterpret its findings. Comedy, starring Reg Varney, Bob Grant and Stephen Lewis(n)

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Chrissy takes over Robin's poker game when he is rushed into hospital. Unfortunately, she does not fully understand the rules and puts the rent money at risk. Comedy, with Paula Wilcox and Richard O'Sullivan(n)

programme.desc: The sleuth finds himself in interesting company as English socialites and American millionaires rub shoulders on board a train bound for the French Riviera. programme.desc: Jack makes Robert fear the worst, and Lorraine's news is music to her mother's ears(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Steve is confident he will be able to talk Alison round, Ivy is relieved when Don returns, and many of the locals gather at number seven to see in the New Year(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ivy is happy when Don goes to confession, Jim and Liz agree to take things one step at a time, and Jack fears that Vera will upset the Hortons and they will never see Tommy again(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Richard Abernethie is found dead shortly after disinheriting his sole heir and specifying that his legacy is to be divided equally among the remaining family members. Poirot is called in by his solicitor friend Gilbert Entwhistle, to ascertain whether the late Mr Abernethie met with foul play - and also finds time to investigate the murder of a beneficiary under the new terms of the will. Whodunit, starring David Suchet, with Robert Bathurst, Anna Calder-Marshall and Geraldine James(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian detective looks forward to a quiet Christmas, but is disturbed by the Foreign Office when an Egyptian prince loses a famous ruby - after making the mistake of lending it to a mysterious woman. Guest starring Stephanie Cole, Nigel Le Vaillant and Tariq Alibai(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Scott investigate the death of a racehorse trainer and suspect an aristocratic family's troubled history holds the key to the mystery - until a second killing makes them think again. Groom Jake Foley seems the obvious suspect, but as events unfold, the detectives' inquiries gradually focus instead on the residents of stately Bantling Hall. Detective drama, starring John Nettles(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Rachel can't get Gill's remarks about her fling with Will out of her head, so ducks out of attending an awards ceremony with him, fearing their colleagues will believe she's sleeping her way to the top. He finally decides that dating her is too much like hard work and so announces they are no longer an item - a move that leaves Rachel gutted and regretting her behaviour. Janet isn't happy either - it's clear her daughter Elise is about to have her heart broken by Eleanor's son Ade. The duo are soon distracted from their woes by a new case involving the murder of a landlord and his wife who were shot at close range in their pub(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Janet voices her concerns to Dodson about Gill's drinking, hoping it can be dealt with amicably, so she's unnerved when her observations are taken more seriously than she intended. Meanwhile, just as Rachel feels like she's getting to grips with the sergeant's job, she makes a fatal error that puts Janet and Chris in danger. The body of a man who disappeared 15 years previously is found on the moors. Inquiries lead to a nearby farm, where the detectives encounter something much more sinister than they could have anticipated(n)

programme.title: Wild at Heart
programme.desc: Strange things are happening at Leopard's Den as Danny prepares to leave for the UK. Frogs have seemingly rained down overnight, the giraffe refuses to budge from the front gate and the cheetah has lost its appetite. Danny jumps at the chance to have one last adventure before his return home - tracking a lioness that attacked a tourist - but it could end in tragedy. Meanwhile, Du Plessis makes an alarming discovery about Ed and Fiona(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A young woman asks Poirot to investigate her father's murder - a 14-year-old crime for which her mother was found guilty and executed. The detective agrees to investigate, but warns his client that he may discover things she does not want to hear. David Suchet stars, with Rachael Stirling, Aidan Gillen, Aimee Mullens, Toby Stephens, Gemma Jones, Patrick Malahide and Annette Badland(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective investigates a double poisoning, aiming to prove the innocence of Elinor Carlisle, the chief suspect in the deaths of her aunt and her rival in love. However, it emerges that she is the only person with a motive, opportunity and means to administer the poison. Crime drama, starring David Suchet, Elisabeth Dermot-Walsh, Diana Quick, Paul McGann and Rupert Penry-Jones(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A philandering husband is found dying by the swimming pool after being shot during a house party at the home of Lady Lucy Angkatell. Legendary Belgian Sleuth Poirot, who is guest of honour at the gathering, appears to have an open-and-shut case on his hands - but the investigator finds himself up against one of his finest adversaries. Whodunit, guest-starring Sarah Miles (Ryan's Daughter), with David Suchet, Lysette Anthony and Edward Fox(n)

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: A local woman is killed when an experiment in biological warfare goes tragically wrong. Sam also falls victim to a potentially fatal illness as a result of the project. Foyle is forced to head into the most secretive and dangerous areas of wartime research, unearthing secrets that cannot be revealed even to the prime minister. Michael Kitchen stars, with Honeysuckle Weeks and Philip Franks(n)

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A professor feels humiliated when her internet dating video is leaked onto a website and watched by her students. The next morning she is found dead, the victim of what appears to be a straightforward suicide. However, Lewis is not convinced and digs deeper, identifying several suspects including the site's founder - but as he and Hathaway get closer to the truth amid a rising death toll, they find their personal and professional lives dredged up online for all to see. Guest starring Roxanne McKee (Game of Thrones) and Toby Stephens (Die Another Day), with Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox(n)

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: The detective has been assigned to a quiet rural area in 1969, and finds himself back in uniform. However, he is reunited with his former CID colleagues when he discovers the body of a missing schoolgirl. Endeavour quickly finds a likely suspect, and is offered the chance to regain his lost status by making an arrest - but Thursday convinces him the man is innocent(n)

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Jack is asked to investigate the theft of a car belonging to a friend of Mullet, but misjudges the grizzled Superintendent's capacity for tact and diplomacy and it is not long before he is taken off the case. Things take a shocking turn when the car finally turns up - with the body of a drug dealer in the boot. Detective drama, starring David Jason, with Melanie Thaw and Bruce Alexander(n)

programme.title: The Syndicate
programme.desc: Jamie lives the high life, convinced the police cannot touch him now he has money - but the past comes back to haunt him when the local drug boss pays a visit. Bob says goodbye to those he loves as he prepares to undergo surgery, and Stuart is torn between his life with Amy and supporting Leanne, who is getting ready for her court case in Wales. Timothy Spall, Matthew McNulty, Joanna Page and Matthew Lewis star(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan indulges a whim and lifts Doreen off the ground, but strains his back in the process. Classic comedy, starring Reg Varney(n)

programme.desc: Text-based information service(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Jack asks Arthur's sister out to the Boxing Day social - much to her brother's displeasure. Vintage comedy, starring Reg Varney(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective sets out for Norfolk when a country publican begs him to help solve a murder - but is disappointed when the innkeeper turns out to be a budding author and the killing fictional. However, he soon has food for thought when a real death occurs - committed by a seemingly ghostly hand. Geraldine Alexander and Ian McCulloch guest star, with David Suchet(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Colonel and Joan Maltravers host a dinner party to celebrate their son's return from Kenya but the meal is disrupted by an armed robbery. David gives chase to the thief and becomes a local hero - much to the exasperation of Bernie. Liz has a difficult decision to make after receiving an exciting offer from Ben. Guest starring Simon Williams, his wife Lucy Fleming and their son Tam Williams(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The police investigate the murder of an ex-army recluse and archaeological enthusiast and suspect a building dispute could provide a motive, while Dennis asks Liz for advice when he begins to notice a change in Jenny's behaviour. Vernon decides to play Cupid on behalf of his relative Gareth and sets him up on a blind date with Rosie, but does not count on the mechanic having another admirer. Rural drama starring Duncan Bell, Aislin McGuckin and Vanessa Hehir(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The dapper Belgian sleuth goes on an Egyptian cruise on board an old steamer, but when an American heiress is murdered, his little grey cells go into overdrive. On questioning each of his fellow passengers, he realises many of them have secrets they want to remain hidden. David Suchet stars, with James Fox, Judy Parfitt, Emily Blunt, Daisy Donovan, Frances de la Tour and David Soul(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth finds himself in interesting company as English socialites and American millionaires rub shoulders on board a train bound for the French Riviera. Passengers include oil magnate Rufus Van Aldin (Elliott Gould) and his daughter Ruth (Jaime Murray) - to whom he has given a magnificent ruby known as the Heart of Fire. With members of the aristocracy crammed into a confined space with their husbands, lovers and a renowned gemstone, murder cannot be far away. With Lindsay Duncan, Roger Lloyd Pack and James D'Arcy(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The murder of a retired university fellow leads to a complex investigation for Morse and Lewis as they piece together a story of student suicide, drugs and the mysterious dismissal of a loyal college scout. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with Phyllis Logan, Gabrielle Lloyd, Amanda Ryan and Tony Haygarth(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A lavish dinner party proves to be a prelude to murder and intrigue - but fortunately Poirot is among the guests, and soon realises the key to the mystery lies in a duel fought 10 years previously. Drama, starring David Suchet, Caroline Langrishe and John McEnery(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Hollywood actress Marina Gregg and her director husband take up residence at Gossington Hall in the village of St Mary Mead and hold a reception to meet their new neighbours, including the hall's previous owner Dolly Bantry. The celebrations turn to tragedy, however, after a fan fatally drinks a poisoned cocktail apparently meant for the new lady of the manor. But a different picture begins to emerge as Marina spits out a similarly spiked cup of coffee on the set of her new film - and Miss Marple investigates the star's unhappy past. Julia McKenzie stars, with Lindsay Duncan, Nigel Harman, Joanna Lumley, Martin Jarvis, Hugh Bonneville and Michele Dotrice(n)

programme.title: Dad's Army (2016)
programme.desc: The officious captain of a seaside town's home guard platoon tries to maintain the reputation and morale of his troops as the Second World War draws to a close. He finds himself dealing with the hunt for a German spy as well as a female journalist sent to report on the exploits of the brave but bumbling soldiers. Comedy based on the TV series, starring Toby Jones, Bill Nighy and Catherine Zeta-Jones(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A depressive gambler is found dead, the apparent victim of suicide. Dr Jane Moore, who once treated the man, is adamant he wouldn't have taken his own life - a theory backed up by the post-mortem. Thrilled to be working with Jane again, Barnaby investigates the case - and it isn't long before another of the doctor's patients is killed. Detective drama, starring John Nettles, Isla Blair, Jan Ravens and Daniel Casey(n)

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: An idyllic summer day in Oxford is torn asunder when a parcel bomb claims the life of eminent mathematician Adam Capstone, a genius in the field of 'Knot Theory'. As Lewis and Hathaway investigate, they discover that, while the victim's academic reputation was beyond reproach, his private life was far more dubious. It emerges Capstone was a man of carnal appetites, who had a string of affairs with young students, betraying his chemistry professor wife Elizabeth, providing her with a clear motive to do away with her cheating spouse. As the detectives work to identify the killer bomber, the case becomes a personal challenge for Lewis, who fears he may not be rewarded with another contract should he fail to impress Moody before his six-month trip to New Zealand. Detective drama, starring Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox, with Zoe Tapper, Tristam Summers and Oliver Lansley(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: As Syndicate 9 investigates the discovery of a woman's body in a Manchester hotel room, Gill introduces Rachel to high-flying DS Will Pemberton, unaware they are already well acquainted - they've been having a passionate, secret relationship for months. But while the volatile copper can be discreet when it comes to romance, will she be able to hide her feelings when Gill lets slip that she wasn't the first choice for the sergeant's job? Meanwhile, Janet is keen to give her own love life a boost, especially after seeing how happy Ade is with his new partner Eleanor. However, a speed-dating event might not be the best option, as Janet finds herself treating each brief encounter like a police interrogation. Crime drama, starring Suranne Jones, Lesley Sharp, Amelia Bullmore, Steve Touissant and Mina Anwar(n)

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Unable to get used to the fact she was second choice for the sergeant's job, Rachel punishes Janet for keeping the truth from her, and although Will cheers her up with the news she has been chosen for a vice initiative, the detective is soon stung by Gill's harsh words. Meanwhile, an unconscious baby is admitted to hospital with injuries that do not match his parents' explanation of events, and when an unregistered childminder and her boyfriend enter the equation, it's unclear who had the boy's best interests at heart(n)

Drama, guest starring Kika Markham(n)

programme.desc: Richard Abernethie is found dead shortly after disinheriting his sole heir and specifying that his legacy is to be divided equally among the remaining family members. Poirot is called in by his solicitor friend Gilbert Entwhistle, to ascertain whether the late Mr Abernethie met with foul play - and also finds time to investigate the murder of a beneficiary under the new terms of the will. Whodunit, starring David Suchet, with Robert Bathurst, Anna Calder-Marshall and Geraldine James(n)

programme.desc: The Belgian detective looks forward to a quiet Christmas, but is disturbed by the Foreign Office when an Egyptian prince loses a famous ruby - after making the mistake of lending it to a mysterious woman. Guest starring Stephanie Cole, Nigel Le Vaillant and Tariq Alibai(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Scott investigate the death of a racehorse trainer and suspect an aristocratic family's troubled history holds the key to the mystery - until a second killing makes them think again. Groom Jake Foley seems the obvious suspect, but as events unfold, the detectives' inquiries gradually focus instead on the residents of stately Bantling Hall. programme.desc: Rachel can't get Gill's remarks about her fling with Will out of her head, so ducks out of attending an awards ceremony with him, fearing their colleagues will believe she's sleeping her way to the top. He finally decides that dating her is too much like hard work and so announces they are no longer an item - a move that leaves Rachel gutted and regretting her behaviour. Janet isn't happy either - it's clear her daughter Elise is about to have her heart broken by Eleanor's son Ade. The duo are soon distracted from their woes by a new case involving the murder of a landlord and his wife who were shot at close range in their pub(n)

programme.title: Rugby World Cup 2019 Highlights
programme.desc: England v South Africa. Jill Douglas presents action from the final, which took place at International Stadium Yokohama and saw the winners of the Webb Ellis Cup crowned. Eddie Jones' men reached their first World Cup final since 2007 with a thrilling 19-7 victory over reigning champions New Zealand seven days ago, while the Springboks overcame Wales in a more attritional affair on Sunday. With commentary by Nick Mullins(n)

programme.title: Live World Series of Darts Finals
programme.desc: Jacqui Oatley presents coverage of the second day of the tournament, featuring all eight second-round matches at the AFAS Live in Amsterdam. The eight seeded players - Michael van Gerwen, Gary Anderson, James Wade, Rob Cross, Damon Heta, Daryl Gurney, Peter Wright and Raymond van Barneveld - all get their competition under way today against the winners of yesterday evening's first-round matches. Wade is the defending champion, having defeated Michael Smith in last year's final. With analysis by Alan Warriner-Little and Chris Mason, and commentary from Stuart Pyke and John Rawling(n)

programme.title: 10 Mistakes That Sank the Titanic
programme.desc: Documentary examining the chain of events that led to the sinking of the ship April 14, 1912, when it struck an iceberg in the north Atlantic and went down with around 1,500 passengers and crew. From the procedure for fixing rivets into the ship's bows, the delays in its construction that pushed the maiden voyage into perilous iceberg season, and the astonishing fact that the lookouts on watch that fateful night had no access to binoculars, this film reveals the 10 key mistakes that conspired to sink the supposedly unsinkable Titanic(n)

programme.title: Then & Now

programme.title: Great British Ships
programme.desc: Rob Bell boards the ship that kick started the age of polar exploration as he looks at the history of RRS Discovery, the world's first purpose-built scientific vessel. Heading to the Victorian shipbuilding capital of Dundee, Rob finds out why this was the only place in Britain that could make a ship capable of taking on the formidable ice floes of Antarctica, and tells the story of how a chance meeting in London would define the course of polar exploration(n)

programme.title: Angels & Demons (2009)

Pope Pius XVI has died suddenly and the four cardinals in line to be his successor have all been abducted by a mysterious sect that is threatening to murder them. As he searches for the kidnapped clerics, Langdon discovers the cult has an even more horrific plan in mind involving a stolen canister of anti-matter. Ron Howard takes the reins once again for the sequel to The Da Vinci Code, with Tom Hanks, Ewan McGregor, Ayelet Zurer Stellan Skarsgard and Pierfrancesco Favino(n)

As DiNozzo and Keates pursue their inquiry, they discover the victim's death is connected to a controversial ATF plan to place traceable firearms in the criminal system, and then follow them to the heads of crime organisations. Naval crime drama, starring Michael Weatherly(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The body of a Navy lieutenant is found on the side of a remote road and toxicology tests reveal he died of overhydration. When another man is found dead nearby, the NCIS team begins to suspect a serial killer is on the loose. Meanwhile, Ducky introduces Gibbs to his new girlfriend. Crime drama, guest starring Cheryl Ladd(n)

programme.title: House Doctor

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Terese stands down at Lassiter's, but installs Chloe as manager and maintains a hands-on role. Elly is pleased for Chloe, until she learns of her plans for a Melbourne Cup event(n)

programme.title: Home and Away

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Officers tail a Renault linked to a gang-related stabbing in Derby,but as they try to make a stop, the driver abandons the car and makes a run for it. programme.desc: A prolific offender is landed with an eyewatering bill to square off three years of illegal travel, while the police must step in when one suspect is found in possession of a banned substance. At one of London's busiest stations, vigilant inspectors Scott and Michelle have success intercepting repeat offenders, but will they catch a notorious passenger who the station staff report comes through their station each day?(n)

programme.title: Bouncers
programme.desc: Documentary following the mobile security personnel who protect Britain's cities from lawless disorder, stepping into situations that were once the domain of the police. In the first edition, bouncers Marek and Greg jump into action when two men refuse to leave a nightclub. Further complicating matters, the men claim they have been assaulted by other doormen and call the police(n)

programme.title: A Walk Among the Tombstones (2014)
programme.desc: An ex cop working as an unlicensed private eye is hired by a drug trafficker to find the men who murdered his wife. As the detective investigates the case, he discovers the men he is tracking have killed many times before and takes desperate measures to stop them claiming another victim. Crime thriller based on Lawrence Block's novel, starring Liam Neeson and Dan Stevens(n)

programme.title: Shark Tale (2004)
programme.desc: Ambitious fish Oscar dreams of escaping his humdrum undersea life. His wish comes true when a gangster shark keen to escape a world of organised crime seeks his help in faking his own death. But Oscar soon finds himself out of his depth as his fearsome reputation gets out of control. Animated comedy, with the voices of Will Smith, Robert De Niro, Martin Scorsese, Renee Zellweger, Angelina Jolie and Jack Black(n)

programme.title: Ice Age: Continental Drift (2012)
programme.desc: A cataclysm leaves prehistoric animals Manny, Sid and Diego lost at sea on a drifting iceberg. They try to find a way to return home, embarking on a journey that leads to an encounter with a ferocious band of piratical creatures. Animated comedy sequel, with the voices of Ray Romano, John Leguizamo, Denis Leary and Peter Dinklage(n)

programme.title: The Book of Life (2014)
programme.desc: A man who longs to be a musician instead of a bullfighter like his father has to compete with a childhood friend when they fall for the same woman. Their love triangle catches the eye of the spirits of the dead, leading him on a journey through their bizarre world. Animated adventure, with the voices of Diego Luna, Zoe Saldana and Channing Tatum(n)

programme.title: Playing for Keeps (2012)

Comedy, starring Gerard Butler, Jessica Biel, Uma Thurman and Catherine Zeta-Jones(n)

Their only hope is to send Wolverine back in time to the 1970s, to join forces with an earlier version of the X-Men and change the events that started the conflict. Superhero adventure sequel uniting the casts of the original movie and prequel First Class, starring Hugh Jackman, Jennifer Lawrence, James McAvoy and Michael Fassbender(n)

programme.desc: A surfer strays into the hunting territory of a great white shark, and finds herself stranded on a tiny island a mere 200 yards from the shore. With the deadly aquatic predator between her and the beach and her safe haven slowly disappearing as the tide comes in, she faces a life or death struggle to get safely back to dry land. Thriller, starring Blake Lively and Oscar Jaenada(n)

programme.title: Brawl in Cell Block 99 (2017)

Distraught, he takes sleeping pills and ends up experiencing one of the wildest nights of his life. Thriller, starring Adam Ild Rohweder and Paulina Galazka(n)

programme.title: Rugrats Go Wild (2003)

Children's animated adventure, with the voices of Nancy Cartwright, Bruce Willis, Lacey Chabert, Elizabeth Daily and Tim Curry(n)

programme.title: The Perfect Catch (2005)

The Farrelly brothers' romantic comedy, starring Jimmy Fallon and Drew Barrymore, inspired by Nick Hornby's football-themed novel Fever Pitch, but with America's favourite sport replacing Britain's(n)

Animated sci-fi adventure, with the voices of Sam Fink, Phillipa Alexander and Lorraine Pilkington(n)

programme.title: One Fine Day (1996)

The pair agree to take it in turns to babysit while struggling to stick to their hectic schedules - but during the course of the day their feelings for each other blossom unexpectedly. Romantic comedy, starring George Clooney, Michelle Pfeiffer, Charles Durning and Mae Whitman(n)

Sci-fi comedy sequel, starring Will Smith, Josh Brolin and Tommy Lee Jones(n)

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction (2014)
programme.desc: The shape-changing robots are driven into hiding when the human race turns against them. When rediscovered by a kindly inventor and his daughter, they come out of exile to save the world, battling a new breed of human-created Transformers. These deadly new machines were created to hunt them down, but are now growing independent and intend to make use of technology from the Transformers' home planet in a plot that could threaten all life on Earth. Fourth film in the sci-fi adventure series, starring Mark Wahlberg, Stanley Tucci and Kelsey Grammer(n)

programme.title: Attack the Block (2011)

As the creatures cause mayhem throughout the estate, she joins forces with her would-be attackers to fight off the extraterrestrial forces. Sci-fi comedy thriller, with Jodie Whittaker, John Boyega and Nick Frost(n)

programme.title: #Horror (2015)

programme.title: Magnificent Obsession (1954)
programme.desc: A wealthy playboy blames himself for the death of the doctor who saved his own life in a boating accident, and when he later falls in love with the medic's widow and a second accident causes her to go blind, he trains as a surgeon in the hope of restoring her sight. Melodrama, starring Rock Hudson, Jane Wyman, Agnes Moorehead and Otto Kruger(n)

programme.title: The Bravados (1958)
programme.desc: A widower visits a town where the men he believes murdered his wife are about to be hanged. When they escape from jail, he takes the law into his own hands and decides to hunt down and kill the fugitives. But over time, he begins to question whether his actions are right. Western, starring Gregory Peck, Joan Collins and Stephen Boyd(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs

Barry falls out with his father when Murray insists on leaving sporting events early to beat the traffic. Ana Gasteyer (Suburgatory) guest stars(n)

Raj goes out with the girls and reveals he had crushes on both Penny and Bernadette - but not Amy. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Unfortunately, his comments are so inappropriate that he is accused of sexual harassment and sent to the university's human resources department, where he ends up dragging Leonard, Raj and Howard into trouble too. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons(n)

Fantasy adventure, starring Freddie Highmore in a dual role alongside Sarah Bolger and Nick Nolte(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys become stranded in the middle of nowhere when Leonard's car is stolen en route to the Bakersfield comic-book convention. Meanwhile, back at home, the women try to work out why the guys are so fascinated with such publications(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is furious when the university forces him to work with Kripke, while Howard's hobby lands him in financial trouble. However, that doesn't stop him and Raj getting expensive action figures of themselves made - much to Bernadette's disapproval(n)

programme.desc: An argument between Leonard and Sheldon over the ending of a Harry Potter book affects Amy and Penny's living arrangements. Meanwhile, Howard goes on a trip to Las Vegas with Bernadette and asks Raj to keep an eye on his mother while he is away(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj is upset after Lucy runs away in the middle of their date, leaving the gang to cheer him up. However, when Howard bumps into her, she admits she is incredibly shy. Meanwhile, Sheldon asks Penny to help with a new episode of Fun with Flags, and because he is impressed by her acting ability, the friends go to see her in a performance of A Streetcar Named Desire(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: While the girls go to Disneyland and get made up as princesses, the guys have to promote science as a career option for women at Howard's old middle school. Meanwhile, Raj and Lucy have their first date in a library, where instead of speaking to each other they send text messages(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

As punishment for his lack of manners, the gang decides he should organise Wolowitz's cluttered wardrobe, but he discovers an unopened letter from Howard's father, who hasn't made contact in years(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

However, the panel includes Mrs Davis from Human Resources, whom Sheldon has crossed paths with before. Guest starring Regina King(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy tries to help Sheldon get over his desire for closure when one of his favourite TV shows is cancelled on a cliffhanger ending. Raj discovers his new girlfriend Lucy has a blog in which she has written about him, and is upset when he learns she believes he has feminine qualities, causing him to worry about their relationship(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Penny and Raj settle into their new living arrangement, but Penny and Raj get along so well together that Leonard starts to feel left out. Sheldon expresses an interest in Amy's work and they begin to collaborate on a scientific project(n)

programme.title: The Inbetweeners

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Simon goes to his first gig since seeing Take That at Wembley Arena, hoping to impress an attractive girl in the year below, but Will, Jay and Neil tag along and jeopardise his chances of wooing her. Comedy, starring Joe Thomas, Simon Bird, James Buckley and Blake Harrison(n)

Also dining are Fran, 47, who meets 46-year-old builder and part-time erotic thriller writer Colin. Plus, part-time model Linford, 25, meets 29-year-old advertising sales manager Xanthi from London, and coffee shop manager Oliver hopes for romance with personal assistant Loren(n)

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: In 2004, Ben sustained a brain injury in a road accident, turning his world upside down. He meets Charlotte, a fellow Mancunian with similar confidence issues. The restaurant also welcomes Megan who is gearing up for the next Olympics, and entrepreneur Steven who has his work cut out trying to melt her heart. Other singleton diners include Xanthi, whose date with Richard gets off to an awkward start when he criticises Richard's hometown of Birmingham(n)

programme.title: First Dates Abroad
programme.desc: Canadian nurse Marquie, 26, is used to getting the pick of the guys, and hopes to find love with charming 23-year-old estate agent Jordan(n)

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: At the start of the new term, Carli organises a fashion show that Simon is eager to participate in. Will tries to shake off his embarrassing reputation, while Jay continues to lie about his sexual experiences. Comedy, starring Emily Head, Joe Thomas, Simon Bird, James Buckley and Blake Harrison(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Lily is reunited with her father at Thanksgiving, and explains the real reason why they stopped speaking three years earlier - but disagrees with Marshall on the best way to heal the rift. American sitcom, starring Alyson Hannigan and Jason Segel(n)

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
